title: Structural engineer to validate acoustic chamber load paths
description: We need a structural engineer experienced with curved timber and composite structures to review and validate the load path design for the main acoustic chambers.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement, budget allocated. Credit as collaborator.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Structural Engineer for Resonance

title: Lighting designer for responsive ambient system
description: Seeking a lighting designer to develop the responsive ambient lighting system that integrates with acoustic sensors. Must work with low-voltage LED systems and DMX or similar control protocols.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement with phased milestones. Full credit as collaborator.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Lighting Designer for Resonance

title: Grant writer with experience in public art / cultural funding
description: Looking for a grant writer or funding strategist experienced with public art commissions, NEA grants, and cultural foundation funding. We have a strong project package and need help with 2–3 targeted applications.
rewardDescription: Percentage-based compensation on successful grants. Negotiable flat fee available.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Grant Writer for Resonance

title: Fiscal sponsor or aligned funding partner
description: Seeking a fiscal sponsor or direct funding partner aligned with public art, ecological design, and immersive cultural experiences. We have a strong project package including renderings, structural documentation, and budget models.
contactEmailSubject: Funding Inquiry: Resonance via Resonance Network

title: Site partner for festival, museum, or civic context
description: Looking for a museum, cultural festival, public art program, or civic partner with a site and audience where Resonance can be installed and experienced. Ideal contexts include outdoor festivals, beachside or park settings, or cultural institutions with outdoor programming capacity.
estimatedScope: Installation partnership, one season or touring
contactEmailSubject: Site Partner Inquiry: Resonance via Resonance Network

title: Grant research lead for arts, ecology, public space
description: Help map aligned grant opportunities across arts, ecology, and public-space funding. We need someone who can identify the best-fit foundations, government programs, and commissions for a project at the intersection of bamboo architecture, immersive art, and public gathering.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement
contactEmailSubject: Grant Research Inquiry: Resonance via Resonance Network

title: Structural engineer for rammed earth wall system
description: Need a structural engineer with rammed earth or alternative masonry experience to validate the wall system design and provide structural calculations for permitting.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement. Full credit on project documentation.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Structural Engineer for Terra Nexus

title: Landscape architect for constructed wetland design
description: Seeking a landscape architect or ecological engineer experienced with constructed wetlands to lead the design of the integrated stormwater/remediation system. Experience with urban brownfield sites preferred.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement with phased milestones. Named collaborator.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Landscape Architect for Terra Nexus

title: Community engagement lead for participatory design process
description: Looking for a community engagement specialist to lead the participatory design workshops with local residents. Experience with underserved urban communities and co-design processes is essential.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement. Named collaborator and co-author on process documentation.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Community Engagement for Terra Nexus

title: Fabrication partner for marine-grade stainless steel mast production
description: Seeking a fabrication shop or manufacturing partner capable of producing 300–500 slender stainless steel masts (marine grade 316L) with integrated cable channels. Prototypes exist; need a partner for production scale.
rewardDescription: Paid fabrication contract. Named fabrication partner.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Fabrication Partner for Luminous Currents

title: Public art consultant for commission applications
description: Looking for a public art consultant experienced with municipal programs and commission processes. Need help identifying 3–5 suitable commission opportunities and preparing competitive applications.
rewardDescription: Paid consulting engagement. Success bonus on secured commissions.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Public Art Consultant for Luminous Currents

title: Electrical engineer for solar-powered sensor network
description: Need an electrical engineer experienced with low-power embedded systems to design the solar harvesting and wireless sensor network architecture for 300–500 individual elements. Must be weather and waterproof for outdoor waterfront deployment.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement with milestones. Named engineering collaborator.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Electrical Engineer for Luminous Currents

title: Acoustic engineer for fungal material testing
description: Seeking an acoustic engineer to collaborate on the measurement and characterization of mycelium composite panels as acoustic absorbers and diffusers. Help define the material specification for the final installation.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement. Co-author on any resulting material research publication.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Acoustic Engineer for Mycelium Sound Chamber

title: Material scientist or mycologist with architectural material experience
description: Looking for a material scientist or mycologist to advise on the growth parameters, substrate composition, and structural performance of mycelium composites at architectural scale. Prior experience with Ecovative or similar mycelium material systems preferred.
rewardDescription: Named collaborator. Paid advisory fee.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Material Scientist for Mycelium Sound Chamber

title: Grant writer for arts and science / material research funding
description: Need a grant writer familiar with grants that sit at the intersection of arts and material science (NSF, NEA, and private foundations). The project has strong conceptual and research merit and needs help developing 2–3 targeted applications.
rewardDescription: Percentage-based compensation on successful grants.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Grant Writer for Mycelium Sound Chamber

title: Structural engineer for tensile shade system
description: Seeking a structural engineer experienced with tensile membrane or tensegrity structures to validate and develop the modular shade system. Must be deployable without permanent foundations for use in public parks and plazas.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement. Named structural collaborator.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Structural Engineer for Canopy Commons

title: Community organizer for pilot site selection and activation
description: Looking for a community organizer or urban planning professional to identify and engage 2–3 underserved neighborhoods as pilot sites. Help with community outreach, co-design workshops, and ongoing activation programming.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement. Named collaborator and project co-lead for community process.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Community Organizer for Canopy Commons

title: Fabrication partner for modular structural system
description: Seeking a fabrication partner to develop and produce the modular steel or aluminum structural nodes and mast system. Prototype exists; looking for a partner to refine and scale the system for production.
rewardDescription: Paid fabrication contract. Named fabrication partner.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Fabrication Partner for Canopy Commons

title: Mechanical engineer for solar-tracking drive system
description: Need a mechanical engineer experienced with actuated tracking systems to design the solar-tracking drive mechanism for the canopy panels. Must handle outdoor loads, wind resistance, and low-maintenance operation over a 20+ year lifespan.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement with phased milestones. Named mechanical engineer.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Mechanical Engineer for Solaris Pavilion

title: Electrical / PV systems engineer

rewardDescription: Paid engagement. Named engineering collaborator.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: PV Engineer for Solaris Pavilion

title: Grant writer for clean energy and public infrastructure funding
description: Looking for a grant writer experienced with clean energy, climate infrastructure, and public art funding (DOE programs, state energy grants, and municipal public art commissions). The project qualifies across multiple funding categories.
rewardDescription: Percentage-based on successful grants. Flat fee option available.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Grant Writer for Solaris Pavilion

title: Spatial audio designer for tidal soundscape
description: Seeking a spatial audio designer or composer experienced with immersive multi-channel audio environments to create the underwater tidal soundscape. Must have experience with ambisonics or VBAP spatial audio systems and real-time audio tools.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement. Named sound designer and composer.
contactEmailSubject: Collaboration Interest: Sound Designer for Deep Current

title: Kinetic fabricator for moving fabric structures

rewardDescription: Paid fabrication contract. Named fabrication collaborator.

title: Venue or exhibition partner

estimatedScope: Exhibition partnership, one or more seasons
contactEmailSubject: Venue Inquiry: Deep Current via Resonance Network

title: Architect or coastal engineer for structural development
description: Looking for an architect or structural/coastal engineer to develop the Tidal Pavilion from concept to construction drawings. Must have experience with coastal environments, tidal exposure, and non-permanent or semi-permanent structures.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement with milestones. Named architect on project.

title: Coastal community partner or site host

title: Grant writer for Indigenous-led and coastal cultural funding
description: Looking for a grant writer with experience in Indigenous-led projects, Pacific cultural heritage funding, and coastal ecology grants. The project connects cultural practice with ecological design in a Pacific coastal context.

title: Landscape architect for ecological corridor design
description: Seeking a landscape architect experienced with urban ecological corridors, native planting systems, and permeable surfaces to develop the design specifications for the Root Network corridors. Experience with participatory design processes required.
rewardDescription: Paid engagement with milestones. Named landscape architect.

title: Grant writer for urban ecology and environmental justice funding
